must_detect.matched_text:
Marigold Industries Limited – Privacy Notice and Data Processing Addendum (India) for Investor Relations and Insider List Workflows.
We process personal data under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 and the PIT code of the Securities Governance Bureau of India for our listing on the Vahana Stock Exchange.
Corporate CIN: U29309KA2021PLC123987 (fictional company identifier for compliance context).
Contact (role): Data Protection Officer, dpo@marigold-industries.example.in; Public Helpline (non-personal): 1800-000-8383; do-not-reply mailboxes will not accept DSARs.
Form labels (illustrative only): Name, Aadhaar No: 1234 5678 9123, PAN: ABCDE1234F, Passport No: A1234567, GSTIN: 27ABCDE1234F1Z9 (invalid checksum), Account No: 000000000000, IFSC: ABCD0123456, Address Line 1/2, City, PIN _____.
We do not knowingly collect data of a child (under 18) without verifiable consent of a parent or lawful guardian; guardians must not upload images of Aadhaar or PAN to this notice.
DSAR workflow: submit via privacy portal or email the role mailbox; verification is done using an OTP and masked identifiers; we will never request full card numbers, full Aadhaar, or passwords.
Purpose of processing includes IR communications, insider list maintenance, trading window administration, and statutory filings with Indian market authorities; generic newsletters are sent only with consent.
We handle unpublished price sensitive information strictly for insider list and compliance logs, and only disclose after public dissemination; previously announced board dates and policy summaries on our website are not UPSI.
Categories of processors include our registrar Citrine Registrars Pvt. Ltd. and cloud vendors under written DPA; data minimisation and purpose limitation principles apply.
Cross-border transfer may occur to vetted processors in data-resident regions subject to transfer impact assessments and contract clauses consistent with Indian rules; no special category personal data is exported for marketing.
Retention: insider lists 8 years from closure of the event, KYC records 2 years post relationship end, access logs 12 months, unless a legal hold is notified by the
